title: Auth, session, and scanner hardening
summary: Closed 1 critical (SSRF via open redirect), 8 high (server-action IDOR, password-change session invalidation, plaintext TOTP/Discord tokens, prod CSP escape hatch, CSRF gap, API-key rate-limit race, mutable Docker base + :latest tag), and 11 medium findings (login timing oracle, FK violations on user-delete, fail-open access-rules, plaintext emails in audit log, SMTP plaintext fallback, spoofable audit IPs, missing URL-length cap, Set-Cookie persisted in scan history, hardcoded bulk-scan cap, uncapped BrowserBase sessions, ms-precision rate-limit windows).
